chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ وَفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – Nazool (Arrival) of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> demise

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/249)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/249)
text: لَمَّا وُلِدَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَكَثَ أَيَّاماً لَيْسَ لَهُ لَبَنٌ فَأَلْقَاهُ أَبُو طَالِبٍ عَلَى ثَدْيِ نَفْسِهِ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ فِيهِ لَبَناً فَرَضَعَ مِنْهُ أَيَّاماً حَتَّى وَقَعَ أَبُو طَالِبٍ عَلَى حَلِيمَةَ السَّعْدِيَّةِ فَدَفَعَهُ إِلَيْهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Sa’d Bin Abdullah, from Ibrahim Bin Muhammad Al Saqafy, from Ali Bin Al Moalla, from his brother Muhammad, from Dorost Bin Abu Mansour, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the (parents of) Prophet<sup>saww</sup> were blessed, he<sup>saww</sup> remained for days, there wasn’t any milk for him<sup>saww</sup>. So Abu Talib<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> cast him<sup>saww</sup> upon his<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> own breast, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Sent down milk from it. So he<sup>saww</sup> breast-fed from him<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> for days until Abu Talib<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> came to Haleema Saeeda, so he<sup>as</sup><sup>ws</sup> handed him<sup>saww</sup> over to her’.
en.sarwar: 26. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr from Rifa‘Abdallah from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “At a certain place around the Ka‘ba ‘Abd al-Muttalib’s people would spread house furnishings for him only and for no one else. His sons would stand around him for protection. Once the Messenger of Allah, then a small child who had just began to walk came to ‘Abd al-Muttalib and sat in his lap. One of the people standing as a guard came to remove the child away but ‘Abd al-Muttalib said, “Leave my child alone. The angel has just come to him.”
